'''Kadlo''' was a [[Duros/Legends|Duros]] [[King/Legends|king]]. [[King Kadlo Tower]] was named after him. [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Cov (Duros)|Cov]] of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] claimed Kadlo as an ancestor.

==Appearances==
*''[[Mission from Mount Yoda]]'' {{1stm}}

*<!-- 2003-01-XX -->''[[Coruscant and the Core Worlds]]''
*<!-- 2003-04-XX -->''[[Ultimate Alien Anthology]]''
